curation_notes: The patch modifies only one file: packages/backend/src/utils/authorization.ts. The fix changes the SQL query in checkProjectAccess from checking organization membership (via the project and account tables) to checking the account_project join table for explicit per-user project access. The pre-assigned class auth-bypass (CWE-285, CWE-863) is correct: the vulnerability is an incorrect authorization check that allows any organization member to access any project. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern.
